title: Easy Optimized 簡易優化模組包
description:
An modpack allows you to play the vanilla Minecraft smoothly, light and fast. 
一個模組包能讓你流暢地遊玩原版Minecraft，輕又快。
body:
![1.21.4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/lsyJHPSm/images/4188d1505328959767727ed2b13846245982aa49.png) # Easy Optimized 簡易優化模組包 Are you tired of the low FPS, stuttering, no shaders, trouble playing with friends in the vanilla Minecraft? Don't want to be troubled by the above problems every time you play Minecraft? In this Easy Optimized Modpack, you can play smoothly. The only thing you have to worry about is whether you have friends to play with you? 你厭倦了原版Minecraft的低FPS、卡頓、沒有光影、與朋友遊玩麻煩嗎? 不想再每次遊玩Minecraft時，遇到以上問題困惱嗎? 在這個簡易優化模組包中，你就能順順的遊玩，你唯一要擔心的就是有沒有朋友陪你玩嗎? 🔹This Modpack focuses on the **smooth gameplay of the original Minecraft** 🔹本整合包主打的就是 **原版Minecraft的流暢遊玩** ![1.21](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/lsyJHPSm/images/d3b1723083fdb0dd5263355311f86be334342716.png) ## Feature 功能 - Improve FPS 提高FPS - Shaders 光影 - moving light source 移動光源 - Connected glass material 相連的玻璃材質 - Input method correction 輸入法修正 - Zoom(Buttom C) 放大(C鍵) - Gamma light(Buttom G)/Night Vision(Buttom N) Gamma亮度(G鍵)/夜視(N鍵) ![1.20](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/lsyJHPSm/images/d4a893d44de33c8f07aeda136730907d9a3d9143.jpeg) --- If you need the functions of other auxiliary mod, please refer to [Redstone Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/rsopt). 如果需要其他輔助模組的功能，請參考[紅石優化模組包](https://modrinth.com/modpack/rsopt)。
![Shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/lsyJHPSm/images/a5ccc73f6592244b3076e716ad0d5472ad42755a.jpeg)
